dialogueChunks.plotStep: The regional authority received the documents, investigated, and removed the commander within a week. The officers who participated in {quest_origin} are being reassigned. {target_npc} was released from detention and the charges dropped. The new garrison leadership actually asked the merchants what they need. I don't know how long this good period will last, but for now, people in {location} are walking with their heads up for the first time in months.
dialogueChunks.outro: You carried documents through a wilderness crawling with danger. It doesn't sound heroic when you say it like that, but those papers toppled a tyrant. Take this: the merchants pooled it together.

playerResponses.text: Papers and persistence beat armor and threats. Enjoy your freedom.
Make sure the next commander is better. Or I'll deliver more documents.
About time someone listened. Take care of yourselves.

dialogueChunks.intro: Come see the forge, {player_name}. You won't believe what we've built.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The hidden forge is operational. {target_npc} has been training apprentices from every family that was shut out by the founding elite. Tools, horseshoes, hinges: we're producing everything the settlement needs without going through the old families' monopoly. They've noticed, of course. But they can't find us, and the people who buy from us aren't talking. For the first time, the power in {location} isn't all in one set of hands.
dialogueChunks.outro: {target_npc} forged something special for you. Said it was the first piece made by free hands in this settlement. Carry it with pride.

playerResponses.text: Free hands making honest goods. That's what a settlement should look like.
A forge they can't find and can't control. Well done.

dialogueChunks.intro: Sit down, {player_name}. Have a drink. This one's a celebration.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The new cache held. {quest_threat} came sniffing around twice but found nothing. Meanwhile, the merchants have been quietly resupplying from our reserves whenever the guards make their rounds. {quest_focus} is collapsing because there's nothing left to threaten us with. {target_npc}'s black eye healed, and they wore it like a badge of honor. The guard captain finally got reassigned after enough complaints reached the outside. Power shifted, quietly, without a single sword drawn.
dialogueChunks.outro: You built the foundation that let ordinary people stand up straight. This is from every merchant in the settlement: a thank-you for teaching us that we don't have to accept what's handed to us.

playerResponses.text: You taught yourselves. I just gathered supplies.
A quiet revolution. The best kind. Take care of each other.
